title: Get MAGAZINE ISSUE-belongs-to-magazine Relationship
description:
* The ›belongs-to-magazine‹ relationship for the selected MAGAZINE ISSUE is returned when one exists. -> Status Code \`200\`
* The response contains the relationship ID, the relationship name and the relationship partner.
* An empty response is returned when the selected MAGAZINE ISSUE has no ›belongs-to-magazine‹ relationship. -> Status Code \`200\`
* Requests with invalid ID are rejected. This can happen when there exists no node with the given ID or it is not a MAGAZINE ISSUE. -> Status Code \`404\`
